title: Leo's Backrooms (Alpha)
description: A Simple Backrooms Mod Made by Leo.
body:
# **Leo's Backrooms, a simple backrooms made by Leo...**

**Ive decided to re support the mod, even tho there's a new mod in the works, i think managing two isn't a bad idea.**

## Description.

**Leo's Backrooms is a Mod based on the Backrooms (how original), and tries to change some of the core fundumentals.**

## **The mod is Available on:**

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/leos-backrooms-alpha) (Depreciated)

[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/99579/leos-backrooms-really-early-access)

[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/leo-s-backrooms-6086329/)


## **Information and Socials!**

**Information about updates, and other stuff is on the
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/VnGjnzDxC2)!**



## **WARNING!**
**This mod is Early Stages of alpha and may contain many Bugs and Glitches, if you perhaps find them you can report it true the discord server.**
